capabilities_used.evidence: 这是他最反复使用的框架之一：2024-02-28 直接写“I am once again showing you the funding rates before the inevitable liquidation event”；2025-08-24 写“over $800m of longs on Binance wiped out in under 10 mins”；2024-07-25 写“over $330m in longs liquidated / stopped in the past 5 mins on binance”。他明显把清算区当成价格磁吸目标。
2024-02-28 明确提到“showing you the funding rates before the inevitable liquidation event”，并把极端 funding 与 squeeze/liquidation event 直接挂钩；他经常在市场恐慌时转向反身性看多。

2025-05-22 写“there’s going to be a BLOW OFF top that’s going to liquidated over $1billion longs in a few hours”；2025-08-26 又说“the market is letting you size up on your longs but price just keeps going down”。这是典型把过热多头拥挤作为反向信号。

2025-05-22 说“this has to be the worst all time high break in BTCs history”；2025-08-26 说“i don’t believe this pump one bit, feels like bait”；2025-07-10 说“this is scam trump up only and all new buyers will be donating to bears soon”。他经常把突破失败和诱多当成核心解释框架。
2025-05-22 明确预期“BLOW OFF top”；图 8 是 BTC 走势上方手绘冲顶后急跌路径，明显是在画抛物线末端衰竭/顶部路径。

2025-10-14 写“seems more like a range bound/chop environment is in the works”；2024-04-29 写“you can’t chop someone who was born in the chop”；2026-04-10 又说“株価がヨコヨコで面白くありませんが...普通はこれです”。他对震荡环境有很强的 regime 识别。
2024-01-31 连发两条 FOMC 帖子：“FOMC: her question made the markets pump” 与 “his question made the market dump”。他显然关注宏观事件窗口对 BTC 的即时波动冲击。
图 7 直接把日经、S&P500、全球股市与 USD/JPY 放在同一监控面板；说明他会用权益市场风险偏好来确认加密方向。
图 7 中 USD/JPY 被放在最显眼位置之一，配合股指一起看，说明他有跨资产外汇/美元流动性视角；2024-09-04 还把“interest rates getting lowered”与 BTC dip buy 直接关联。
2024-07-25 直接写“classic inverse h&s pattern  $ETH”。这是少数被他明确点名的传统形态。

2025-02-28 写“CAPITULATION WICK INCOMING STAY AWAY FROM LEVERAGE”；2025-08-28 写“i will wait for the inevitable September liquidation event and go all in”；2025-02-28 还说“CZ is ready to catch the knife up until $70k. below there... the exchanges go offline”。明显强调等清算完成，不盲目接刀。
2025-05-12 写“you should always know the worst outcome of each trade you take… and you must be okay with it. calculate everything”；2025-02-28 写“STAY AWAY FROM LEVERAGE”。虽然表达戏谑，但底层是严格的风险预算意识。
他大量围绕“liquidation event”“capitulation wick”“under 10 mins wiped out”来发帖，说明会先判断市场是否处在极端波动 regime，再决定是否出手。
2025-08-26 写“altcoins should not be outperforming BTC by this much”；2024-11-24 简写“alt season”。他会把 BTC 与山寨相对强弱作为真假行情过滤器。
2024-12-30 对“10,000,000,000 #USDT minted at Tether Treasury”高度关注，说明他把稳定币铸造/流动性注入视作市场燃料代理变量。
2024-07-25 在巨额清算帖中反讽“welcome to the ETF inflows”；2024-04-30 也提到 Hong Kong ETF。虽然不是主框架，但他会把 ETF narrative 当作行情解释变量。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Exchange Cartel / Venue Manipulation Read
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 交易所操盘/场馆操纵识别
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat exchange behavior, outage timing, suspicious order-book action, and forced-liquidation cascades as an explanatory and tradable market structure input.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把交易所宕机时点、盘口异常、强平瀑布、疑似场馆对手盘行为，作为可交易的市场结构输入，而不只是噪音。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-10-11: “exchange only goes down so they can close their positions & fill at best prices”；2025-10-15: “Binance really refunded their customers then liquidated them again after 24 hrs”；2025-04-22: “CARTEL.EXE”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Timeline Despair Bottom Filter
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 时间线绝望情绪底部过滤器
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use extreme community despair, silence, and forced-seller psychology on the timeline as a soft contrarian bottoming signal.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把时间线沉默、绝望、爆仓后麻木、家人面前强装正常等群体情绪，作为偏底部的反向软信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-28: “the timeline is silent but every crypto participant is watching price”；2025-10-11: “watching your bags plummet by the gazzillions while having to act normal around the family”；2025-11-04: “if you are not a forced seller at these prices, you already won”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Asia Session Liquidity Raid
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track thin-liquidity Asia-session moves for oversized liquidation raids, then fade or frame the follow-through depending on whether the move reclaims key levels.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 重点盯亚洲时段在薄流动性下的异常扫单/强平动作，再根据关键位是否收回，决定反手还是顺势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-10-14: “infinite BTC seller nuked nearly $1B of open interest... during asia session”；2024-09-02: “market selling 7 figs at the lows during asia session”。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 高置信度结论常用半戏谑口吻落地，等于“我已经有方向判断，不再展开论证”。

personal_quirks.quote: CAPITULATION WICK INCOMING  STAY AWAY FROM LEVERAGE  REGARDS
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 预期强平针时，先降低杠杆暴露，等清算完成再考虑出手。

personal_quirks.quote: you should always know the worst outcome of each trade you take…  and you must be okay with it.  calculate everything… hope you understand
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 每笔交易先定义最大损失，接受不了就不做。

personal_quirks.quote: you spend years learning & mastering price action concepts...   when all you had to learn was patience  few understand
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 等待比频繁出手更重要，时机优先于复杂技术细节。

personal_quirks.quote: there is no better education in trading than being underwater in a position & watching the 1min chart for 2 weeks straight
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他很重视仓位中的心理压力测试和盘中微观波动观察，带有明显交易员实战主义色彩。

unique_traits: 他不是纯形态派，而是把清算数据、funding、交易所行为、宏观 headline 和社交情绪揉成一个“反身性操盘剧本”。与常见 TA 交易员不同，他大量使用“liquidation event / cartel / scam pump”这类叙事来描述市场结构，本质上是在交易拥挤仓位和流动性猎杀。传统图形他会用，但更多是辅助确认，核心 edge 来自对杠杆挤压与情绪极值的反向理解。

high_conviction_phrases: everything is going according to plan
